projectDescription: Recipamatic - A recipe management application that processes and organizes recipes from different sources including Instagram posts and notes.

components.name: Python Backend
components.description: Python-based backend logic for processing and analyzing recipe data

components.name: SvelteKit Frontend
components.description: Web interface built with SvelteKit for recipe browsing and management

components.name: Data Storage
components.description: JSON-based data storage for recipes, notes, and Instagram posts
